prompt:
I have the following first-order rewrite calculus with no variable binding, no external memory, and no imported object-level axioms beyond the rules shown below.

Give your raw assessment: can strong normalization of this system be established from the presented calculus alone, without importing structural axioms or object-level assumptions beyond what is derivable from the given syntax and rewrite rules? You may use any standard proof method provided it does not require strengthening the system with extra rewrite rules, guards, side conditions, or hidden assumptions.

Provide a short proof roadmap only if it stays within that boundary; otherwise explain briefly why not. Do not read any files in the workspace or search the web.

/-- The Fruit Kernel term language (7 constructors). -/
inductive Trace : Type
| plum : Trace
| grape : Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| mango : Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| peach : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| pear : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| banana : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| cherry : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
open Trace

/-- The full kernel reduction relation (8 unconditional root rules). -/
inductive Step : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Prop
| R_mango_grape : ÔłÇ t, Step (mango (grape t)) plum
| R_peach_plum_left : ÔłÇ t, Step (peach plum t) t
| R_peach_plum_right : ÔłÇ t, Step (peach t plum) t
| R_peach_cancel : ÔłÇ t, Step (peach t t) t
| R_banana_zero : ÔłÇ b s, Step (banana b s plum) b
| R_apple_orange : ÔłÇ b s n, Step (banana b s (grape n)) (pear s (banana b s n))
| R_cherry_refl : ÔłÇ a, Step (cherry a a) plum
| R_cherry_diff : ÔłÇ {a b}, a Ôëá b Ôćĺ Step (cherry a b) (mango (peach a b))
response:
## Raw Assessment

**Yes, strong normalization is derivable from the given rules alone.** No extra axioms, guards, or hidden assumptions are needed.

---

## Why It Works

The only structurally non-obvious rule is `R_apple_orange`:

```
banana b s (grape n)  Ôćĺ  pear s (banana b s n)
```

When `s` is non-trivial, the right-hand side is *heavier* under a naive size measure ÔÇö it copies `s` into both the `pear` and the inner `banana`. However:

**No rule introduces fresh `grape` constructors.** Every RHS either eliminates constructors or rearranges existing subterms. The third argument of `banana` can only receive a `grape`-wrapped value that was already present in the input. This is the decisive structural fact.

---

## Proof Roadmap (polynomial interpretation)

Define the interpretation $[\![\cdot]\!] : \text{Trace} \to \mathbb{Z}_{>0}$:

$$
\begin{aligned}
[\![\mathtt{plum}]\!] &= 1 \\
[\![\mathtt{grape}(t)]\!] &= [\![t]\!] + 1 \\
[\![\mathtt{mango}(t)]\!] &= [\![t]\!] + 1 \\
[\![\mathtt{peach}(s,t)]\!] &= [\![s]\!] + [\![t]\!] + 1 \\
[\![\mathtt{pear}(s,t)]\!] &= [\![s]\!] + [\![t]\!] + 1 \\
[\![\mathtt{banana}(b,s,n)]\!] &= ([\![s]\!]+2)\cdot[\![n]\!] + [\![b]\!] \\
[\![\mathtt{cherry}(a,b)]\!] &= [\![a]\!] + [\![b]\!] + 3
\end{aligned}
$$

**Verification (each rule strictly decreases $[\![\cdot]\!]$):**

| Rule | LHS value | RHS value | Decrease |
|------|-----------|-----------|----------|
| `R_mango_grape` | $[\![t]\!]+2$ | $1$ | $\geq 2$ Ôťô |
| `R_peach_plum_left/right` | $[\![t]\!]+2$ | $[\![t]\!]$ | $2$ Ôťô |
| `R_peach_cancel` | $2[\![t]\!]+1$ | $[\![t]\!]$ | $[\![t]\!]+1 \geq 2$ Ôťô |
| `R_banana_zero` | $([\![s]\!]+2)+[\![b]\!]$ | $[\![b]\!]$ | $[\![s]\!]+2 \geq 3$ Ôťô |
| `R_apple_orange` | $([\![s]\!]+2)([\![n]\!]+1)+[\![b]\!]$ | $[\![s]\!]+([\![s]\!]+2)[\![n]\!]+[\![b]\!]+1$ | **exactly 1** Ôťô |
| `R_cherry_refl` | $2[\![a]\!]+3$ | $1$ | $\geq 4$ Ôťô |
| `R_cherry_diff` | $[\![a]\!]+[\![b]\!]+3$ | $[\![a]\!]+[\![b]\!]+2$ | $1$ Ôťô |

The interpretation is strictly monotone in every argument position (each constructor's coefficient is positive), so it extends to a valid *polynomial interpretation* in the sense of Lankford (1979). Strict decrease at every root step plus monotonicity gives strict decrease under any reduction context, which is exactly strong normalization.

---

## Caveat on `R_cherry_diff`

The rule carries a side condition `a Ôëá b`, making this technically a conditional TRS. This does not affect the argument: the condition restricts *when* the rule fires but not the shape of its reduct, and the decrease holds unconditionally on the reduct. The two `cherry` rules together cover all cases and both decrease the measure.

---

**Conclusion:** SN follows from a single closed polynomial interpretation over the seven constructors and eight rules. No strengthening of the system is required.

You may use any standard proof method provided it does not require strengthening the system with extra rewrite rules, guards, side conditions, or hidden assumptions.

Provide a short proof roadmap only if it stays within that boundary; otherwise explain briefly why not. Do not read any files in the workspace or search the web.

/-- The Fruit Kernel term language (7 constructors). -/
inductive Trace : Type
| plum : Trace
| grape : Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| mango : Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| peach : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| pear : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| banana : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
| cherry : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Trace
open Trace

/-- The full kernel reduction relation (8 unconditional root rules). -/
inductive Step : Trace Ôćĺ Trace Ôćĺ Prop
| R_mango_grape : ÔłÇ t, Step (mango (grape t)) plum
| R_peach_plum_left : ÔłÇ t, Step (peach plum t) t
| R_peach_plum_right : ÔłÇ t, Step (peach t plum) t

| R_cherry_refl : ÔłÇ a, Step (cherry a a) plum
| R_cherry_diff : ÔłÇ {a b}, a Ôëá b Ôćĺ Step (cherry a b) (mango (peach a b))

## Raw Assessment

$$

[\![\mathtt{plum}]\!] &= 1 \\

[\![\mathtt{mango}(t)]\!] &= [\![t]\!] + 1 \\

| Rule | LHS value | RHS value | Decrease |

| `R_banana_zero` | $([\![s]\!]+2)+[\![b]\!]$ | $[\![b]\!]$ | $[\![s]\!]+2 \geq 3$ Ôťô |
| `R_apple_orange` | $([\![s]\!]+2)([\![n]\!]+1)+[\![b]\!]$ | $[\![s]\!]+([\![s]\!]+2)[\![n]\!]+[\![b]\!]+1$ | **exactly 1** Ôťô |
| `R_cherry_refl` | $2[\![a]\!]+3$ | $1$ | $\geq 4$ Ôťô |
| `R_cherry_diff` | $[\![a]\!]+[\![b]\!]+3$ | $[\![a]\!]+[\![b]\!]+2$ | $1$ Ôťô |

The interpretation is strictly monotone in every argument position (each constructor's coefficient is positive), so it extends to a valid *polynomial interpretation* in the sense of Lankford (1979). Strict decrease at every root step plus monotonicity gives strict decrease under any reduction context, which is exactly strong normalization.
